h1: 4 Outdoor Fireplace Ideas Inspired by HGTV's Rock the Block
h3: Connect with a Heat & Glo dealer near you to see the products firsthand or ask about specific pricing and details.

paragraphs: Nothing can rival the magic that an outdoor fireplace brings to a backyard. It's more than a heat source—it’s a transformative element that elevates an ordinary patio into an enchanting sanctuary.

But amidst a sea of design possibilities, how do you choose the perfect fireplace for your outdoor space? To help you navigate, we've handpicked four designer outdoor fireplace ideas from HGTV's hit show, Rock the Block.
Designers: Jonathan Knight and Kristina Crestin

Step into this on-trend space, featuring the Courtyard Outdoor Gas Fireplace, a versatile unit that can fit any design style. This masterpiece redefines outdoor living, inviting you to enjoy the pleasures of your patio no matter the season.
Designers: Michel Smith Boyd and Anthony Elle
There’s only one word to describe this outdoor space, and that’s “stunning.” The modern Lanai See-Through Outdoor Fireplace is the perfect centerpiece for this breathtaking backdrop.
For a one-two punch, the Twilight Modern cannot be beat. This double-sided fireplace features sophisticated black stone on the interior and gorgeous limestone on the exterior.
A typical firepit can’t hold a candle to the Lanai Outdoor Gas Fireplace. With its enchanting flames dancing from one end to the other and built-in seating, this design is a true wonder.
Ready to level up your outdoor living game? A fireplace could be just the ticket! Find a dealer near you to get started on your project.

Bring warmth, light and intention to your outdoor space with the Lanai double-sided outdoor gas fireplace. A ribbon of flames dances across vibrant crushed glass, creating an atmosphere that feels equal parts refined and inviting. Crafted from rust-resistant stainless steel, the Lanai is built to perform beautifully in the elements, season after season. Choose from 48" or 60" widths, with this double-sided configuration that adapts seamlessly to patios, terraces and open-air living spaces.
The first indoor/outdoor gas fireplace trends ahead with the Twilight Modern see-through model. Artistic flames rise through crushed glass with no chimney or venting needed in a contemporary design.

Create a space that brings family and friends together with the Outdoor Lifestyles® Courtyard gas fireplace. It’s the easy way to expand your livable area and extend the outdoor season with cozy warmth in a nostalgic look.

Bring warmth, light and intention to your outdoor space with the Lanai outdoor gas fireplace. A ribbon of flames dances across vibrant crushed glass, creating an atmosphere that feels equal parts refined and inviting. Crafted from rust-resistant stainless steel, the Lanai is built to perform beautifully in the elements, season after season. Choose from 48", 60" or 72" widths, with single- or double-sided configurations that adapt seamlessly to patios, terraces and open-air living spaces.
It’s possible to enjoy a single fireplace both inside and outside your home!
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
